title: Immunohistochemistry Protocol (brain post-mortem tissue)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2tjde","text":"This protocol details the immunohistochemistry steps for antibody blocking over a period of 2 days.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

hematoxylin","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4fgje","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3m43j","text":"EQUIPMENT","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7raub","text":"Microwave","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Sequential rehydration Xylene, 100% EtOH, 90% EtOH, 70% EtOH, dH 2 O – 5 min in each:

Antigen Retrieval Microwave slides at high power for 00:20:00 in 0.05 % (v/v), Tween 20 in Sodium Citrate Buffer , pH 6 . Sodium citrate recipe: 2.94 g, Tri-sodium citrate (dehydrate) 1000 mL, Distilled water Mix to dissolve, adjust to pH 6 with 1N HCl and then add 0.5 mL, Tween 20 and mix well. *Store at RT for 3 months or at 4°C for longer storage.
Wash 3 x 5 min with TBPS ( 0.05 % (v/v), Tween 20 in 1xPBS ):
Endogenous peroxidase blocking Incubate slides in 3 % (v/v), hydrogen peroxide (H2O2) in TPBS at Room temperature for 00:15:00 .
Blocking for 1 hour Blocking Solution (e.g. 5% Normal horse serum in TPBS).
Primary antibody – Overnight incubation Dilute in TPBS in appropriate concentration and incubate Overnight at 4 °C .
Secondary antibody Dilute antibody in blocking solution and incubate for 02:00:00 at Room temperature
ABC solution (DAB substrate) *Prepare 00:30:00 before use! Make 5 mL, TPBS with 2 drops of reagent A and 2 drops of reagent B. Leave ABC on tissue for 01:00:00
DAB Stain Make 5 mL, dH20 with: 2 drops of buffer ( pH 7.5 ), 4 drops of ABC and 2 drops of hydrogen peroxide. Incubate with DAB at Room temperature until colour change.
Counterstaining with Hematoxylin Place slides in tip box of hematoxylin for 00:00:30 .
Dehydration process 70% EtOH, 90% EtOH, 100% EtOH, Xylene:
Mounting Slides Mount slides using medium DPX.
Wash 1 of 3: 00:05:00, with TBPS (1x PBS + 0.05% Tween 20)
Wash 3 of 3: 00:05:00, with TBPS (1x PBS + 0.05% Tween 20)
Wash 2 of 3: 00:05:00, with TBPS (1x PBS + 0.05% Tween 20)
Rehydrate samples in dH 2 O for 00:05:00 .

Put slides in acid alcohol, 00:00:01 quickly in and out. Keep the slides in running water for 00:03:00 for blueing. 1% Acid alcohol: 350 mL, Industrial methylated spirit (denatured alcohol) 5 mL, HCl 154 mL, dH2O
creator: Laura Castilla-Vallmanya
